headline: How Options Can Help Traders Wrangle SMCI Stock's Volatility
summary: Super Micro Computer[ticker symb=SMCI] dance within highly volatile markets is less than impressive for most investors, but SMCI stock could provide opportunities for investors willing to consider options trading.  The data server and tech company is currently trading below most of its moving averages, including the 200-day moving average and 50-day moving average.

headline: Super Micro Stock Rises as AI Chip-Smuggling Case Takes Another Twist
summary: Super Micro Computer  stock rose Thursday even as the broader universe of data-center stocks slipped.  The U.S. government charged co-founder Yih-Shyan “Wally” Liaw and two other individuals last month regarding an alleged plan to divert U.S.-assembled servers to China in a violation of export-control laws.  Super Micro didn’t respond to a request for comment Thursday.

headline: Super Micro Stock Drops as AI Chip-Smuggling Case Takes Another Twist
summary: Super Micro Computer stock was falling ahead of the open Thursday along with broader tech-sector selling.  The U.S. government charged co-founder Yih-Shyan “Wally” Liaw and two other individuals last month regarding an alleged plan to divert U.S.-assembled servers to China in a violation of export-control laws.  The shares were pointing more than 3% lower in premarket trading Thursday after President Donald Trump’s address to the nation appeared to extinguish any hopes of a swift end of the Iran war.
